Crop Name: tobacco

Profile
- Season type: long-season (TSUM total=3897 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: cool-adapted (TBASEM=0.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature + daylength (IDSL=1, DLO=1.00 h)
- Root/water trait: shallow-rooted, more drought-tolerant (RDMCR=70.00 cm, DEPNR=4.50)
- Assimilation trait: lower assimilation potential (AMAX peak=25.00)
- Storage allocation: late storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=2.00)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0400
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0078, DVS1=0.0052
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.0710, DVS1=0.0480

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
